meaning: adj.单眼的,单眼用的,单目镜的,单筒的
examples: Chromostereopsis involves cortical areas that underlie depth processing for both monocular and binocular cues.
A method to measure object distance by monocular vision was proposed.
The measuring methods based on the computer monocular vision has many advantages.
Vuzix is planning a line of both monocular and binocular SMART Glasses for the Commercial, Industrial and Consumer markets.
Lumus was showing off two different types of wearable displays, the development kit -- or DK-32 shown above -- and the PD-18-4 a monocular version using the same technology.
